canonical_name: Acyl-CoA Synthetase Long Chain Family Member 4
step_rationale: ACSL4 mediates ferroptosis via lipid peroxidation; controls plaque inflammatory cell death and oxidative stress.
mechanism: Acyl-CoA synthetase that activates polyunsaturated fatty acids for ferroptotic lipid peroxidation, a mechanism linking macrophage oxidative stress to plaque inflammation and instability.

references.title: Xanthosine alleviates myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury through attenuation of cardiomyocyte ferroptosis.
Comprehensive metagenomic and lipidomic analysis showed that baicalin could improve depressive behaviour in atherosclerotic mice by inhibiting nerve cell ferroptosis.
Integrating metagenomics, lipidomics and proteomics to explore the effect and mechanism of ginsenoside Rb1 on atherosclerosis co-depression disease.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
